title: Thailand B.E. 2568: Controlled Herb Framework & Export Licensing
excerpt: How Thailand B.E. 2568 controlled-herb rules reshape medical cannabis export: DTAM oversight, export licensing intent, permit documentation, and what EU importers expect when sourcing from Thai operators.

title: THC Thresholds, Narcotics Exceptions & Seed-to-Sale Traceability
excerpt: Low-THC medical export norms, narcotics research exceptions, batch-level DTAM reporting, and seed-to-sale traceability for Thai cannabis moving toward the European medicinal supply chain.

title: Thai GACP: Farm-Level Quality as the EU-Readiness Baseline
excerpt: Thai GACP as the farm foundation for EU-bound medical cannabis: contamination control, genetics traceability, heavy metals, and why GACP maturity beats raw hectarage when negotiating with EU-GMP partners.

title: EU-GMP & Annex 7: When Post-Harvest Processing Becomes Manufacturing
excerpt: When drying, trimming, and curing trigger EU-GMP and Annex 7 herbal rules—not agriculture alone—and how Thai post-harvest facilities should design validation, change control, and batch records for EU inspectors.

title: The Qualified Person (QP) & EU Batch Certification
excerpt: How the European Qualified Person certifies batches for the medicinal market, what Thai exporters should pre-build in batch folders, analytical packages, and impurity narratives before QP review.

title: GDP Cold Chain & Long-Haul Integrity to Europe
excerpt: GDP cold-chain design for Thailand-to-Europe medical cannabis: lane qualification, temperature mapping, logger traceability to airway bills, and documentary evidence EU GDP auditors accept under stress.

title: Cantrak: Digital Traceability for Export-Grade Evidence
excerpt: Digital seed-to-sale traceability (Cantrak) for export-grade evidence: linking licences, batch genealogy, lab COAs, and shipping paperwork so EU partners reduce spreadsheet risk and due diligence time.

title: European Pharmacopoeia Alignment: From Thai GACP Data to Monograph Thinking
excerpt: Turning Thai GACP and lab data into Ph. Eur.-style specification thinking for EU medical cannabis: identity, purity, microbiological strategy, and trending that supports importer monograph discussions.

title: Germany: Medical Demand, Import Pathways & Partnership Structures
excerpt: Germany medical cannabis demand, import pathways, EU-GMP expectations, and partnership models for Thai suppliers—strategic overview of how the largest EU market sources compliant inflorescence and extracts.

title: From Agriculture to Pharmaceutical Mindset: A Thai–EU Export Roadmap
excerpt: A practical Thai-to-EU export roadmap: licence-to-lot traceability, GACP-to-GMP transition, QP-ready records, GDP logistics, and digital systems like Cantrak—why document quality wins bids before scale alone.
